chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Criminal Misc. Application No.S-175 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on M.A.No. 2547/2023 (E/A). 3. For hearing of main case. ------ 22.09.2025 Mr. Niaz Ali Ansari, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Ali Bux Mashori, Advocate for the proposed accused. Mr. Nazir Hussain Bhangwar, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w SIP Amjad Ali. ------ The applicant has challenged the order dated 29.04.2023, passed by learned I-Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Larkana in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.601 of 2023, whereby the application filed by the applicant was declined. The learned trial Court while dealing with the application made the following observations in para-4 of the impugned order dated 29.04.2023: The incharge District Complaint and Redressal Cell, Larkana in his statement has submitted as under: “It appears that the tussle between the parties is over constructed house where proposed accused is residing on ground floor while applicant is residing over top portion of house, and tussle between the parties is going on since long over such house, which is purely kind of civil nature, no any offence as per allegations of applicant has been occurred, and applicant made an application before SSP, Larkana same was endorsed to S.H.O., P.S. Sachal and applicant without approaching S.H.O concerned file this application to litigate the civil matter in criminal dispute.” It appears that there is a dispute over the immovable property between husband of the applicant and the proposed accused Zulfiquar Ali, who are brothers and in order to settle the score of the said dispute this lady is being used as a weapon to initiate the criminal proceedings against proposed accused Zulfiquar Ali and such a practice cannot be appreciated at all.

The learned trial Court while dealing with the application made the following observations in para-4 of the impugned order dated 29.04.2023: The incharge District Complaint and Redressal Cell, Larkana in his statement has submitted as under: “It appears that the tussle between the parties is over constructed house where proposed accused is residing on ground floor while applicant is residing over top portion of house, and tussle between the parties is going on since long over such house, which is purely kind of civil nature, no any offence as per allegations of applicant has been occurred, and applicant made an application before SSP, Larkana same was endorsed to S.H.O., P.S. Sachal and applicant without approaching S.H.O concerned file this application to litigate the civil matter in criminal dispute.” It appears that there is a dispute over the immovable property between husband of the applicant and the proposed accused Zulfiquar Ali, who are brothers and in order to settle the score of the said dispute this lady is being used as a weapon to initiate the criminal proceedings against proposed accused Zulfiquar Ali and such a practice cannot be appreciated at all. Accordingly, no illegality or irregularity has been pointed out in the impugned order dated 29.04.2023, therefore, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application merits no consideration; hence it is hereby dismissed alongwith the listed application. Judge Manzoor
